query:
SELECT c.id, c.nomeCompleto, c.cpfCnpj, COUNT(p.id) as numProcessos
FROM clientes c
LEFT JOIN processos p ON p.clienteId = c.id
WHERE c.nomeCompleto LIKE '%BANCO%' OR c.nomeCompleto LIKE '%CAIXA ECON%' OR c.nomeCompleto LIKE '%ITAU%' OR c.nomeCompleto LIKE '%BRADESCO%' OR c.nomeCompleto LIKE '%SANTANDER%'
GROUP BY c.id, c.nomeCompleto, c.cpfCnpj
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute 
SELECT c.id, c.nomeCompleto, c.cpfCnpj, COUNT(p.id) as numProcessos

LEFT JOIN processos p ON p.clienteId = c.id
WHERE c.nomeCompleto LIKE '%BANCO%' OR c.nomeCompleto LIKE '%CAIXA ECON%' OR c.nomeCompleto LIKE '%ITAU%' OR c.nomeCompleto LIKE '%BRADESCO%' OR c.nomeCompleto LIKE '%SANTANDER%'
GROUP BY c.id, c.nomeCompleto, c.cpfCnpj
